title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant Enhancements for DSA Practice
summary: Showcase the upgraded AI assistant in CodeGrind, highlighting Azure OpenAI integration, multi-model support, and enhanced guidance within the DSA practice platform.
core_message: CodeGrind now features an upgraded AI assistant with Azure OpenAI integration, GPT-4o model support, and a more persistent, context-aware guidance flow to accelerate DSA learning without leaving the editor.
cta: Try the enhanced AI assistant in CodeGrind and share your workflow improvements with the community.
visual_brief: A short 15-20 second video montage showing the CodeGrind editor with AI chat panel, switching between GPT-4o models, code solving hints appearing inline, and a quick problem-solving demo. Include subtle cyberpunk UI cues and a clean, readable code pane.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
